app.title: Unfolder for Mac – A 3D model unfolding tool for creating papercraft
app.author: codazoda
app.description: 3D model unfolding tool for papercraft creation
proposed_tests: Unfold a complex 3D model, measure accuracy vs human-facilitated unfolding
Test papercraft creation process from unfolded model
Benchmark performance on large, complex models
